title: Author typed composition map of the 20+ workflow/operation schema families
description: Comprehension bead 4/4 for agent-blame-shielded-workflow-doctrine. Author a typed report showing how substrate's ~20 workflow/operation-layer families compose: workflow-schemas + operating-protocol-schemas + workflow-graph-doctrine-schemas + substrate-compound-schemas + work-graph-schemas + work-graph-event-schemas + mission-schemas + scenario-schemas + scenario-session-schemas + workstream-schemas + workstream-template-schemas + role-workflow-schemas + kickoff-receipt-schemas + kickoff-review-schemas + execution-receipt-schemas + receipt-schemas + operating-rhythm-schemas + ifttt-directive-schemas + conversation-protocol-schemas + release-operations-schemas + paperclip-issue-protocol-schemas. For each, identify: layer (contract / SOP / doctrine / events / receipts / etc.); what it references via LinkRef; what references it; whether it's a primary type or supporting. Output: a typed JSON composition graph (could be a SubstrateCompoundModel instance) + a markdown landscape diagram in the investigation.docc bundle. This is the work that prevents future agents from re-authoring redundant families.
